otion from a combination of flexure (or revolute) joints. A SolidWorks® depiction of how this linkage works is shown below. Here, the right solid rectangle slides linearly back and forth with respect to the left solid rectangle. Although inheren

pect to the left solid rectangle. Although inherently 2D in nature, this linkage can still be constructed from the basic kit parts of links and flexure elements as shown below and then folded into its final configuration. 4-Bar Linkage 5-Bar
